arts.ttl: Napoli Open Talks for Feyenoord Star Igor Paixao
arts.sum: Napoli and Feyenoord have reportedly held preliminary talks over Igor Paixao's potential summer transfer to Serie A. According to Calciomercato, the Scudetto hopefuls have tested the waters for the sought-after forward. The post Napoli Open Talks for Feyenoord Star Igor Paixao appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
